project-intro-detail-part1.zh: 由广州实验室粤港澳大湾区生物信息中心自主研发的 Bio-OS（生物医学大数据操作系统），致力于为基因分析提供易用、经济、高效的云端平台部署方案。
project-intro-detail-part1.en: Developed by the Guangzhou Laboratory Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Center of Bioinformation, Bio-OS is a biomedical big data operating system that provides user-friendly, economical, and high-throughput cloud deployment solutions for genetic analysis.
